description: AQ-10 perfect score plus high RAADS-R, late-identified man in his mid-30s with strong masking themes.

expectedQualities.notes: Should open with the strength of the signal, develop the meaning of the subscale shape, hold diagnostic line, suggest specific authors and adult-focused clinicians, close with grounding.

intake.intakeFreeText: I've spent my whole life feeling like I'm performing in social situations. I rehearse conversations in my head. I get profoundly drained by parties even when I enjoy them. Recently I read Devon Price's book and almost everything in it sounded like me. I'm trying to understand whether what I'm noticing is real or whether I'm pattern-matching to something I read.

screeners.cutoffMeaning: A score of 6 or above suggests that further assessment may be appropriate.

screeners.fullName: Ritvo Autism Asperger Diagnostic Scale - Revised
screeners.cutoffMeaning: A score of 65 or above is consistent with the autism spectrum.
